seo.title: Careers at DSRC - Join Our Team
seo.description: Explore career opportunities at DSRC. We're constantly seeking exceptional talent.

hero.title: CAREERS
hero.subtitle: Looking for a new challenge? At DSRC, we offer a wide range of career options and an opportunity to work in a vibrant work environment!

intro.heading: Take your career to new heights
intro.subheading: We're constantly seeking exceptional talent, your next big opportunity awaits here — Innovate, Grow, Succeed. Join the team that values you!
intro.question: Are you creative, passionate, entrepreneurial and have the ability to solve problems with a little ingenuity?
intro.answer: Well then, you are one-step closer to being part of a great workplace. We welcome you!
paragraphs: At DSRC we have built a reputation for recruiting, retaining and nurturing the most talented individuals in the industry.
We select individuals for the right blend of talent, culture, and leadership, creating a team that is passionate about challenging work and a sense of belonging.

Our core teams have an average of over 15 years of professional experience with DSRC, a remarkable statistic that speaks volumes about the quality of our work environment and the opportunities we provide.
With offices in India, USA, UK, and the Netherlands, we offer truly global career opportunities.

highlights.title: People
highlights.description: Our greatest asset — talented professionals who are passionate about technology and committed to excellence.

highlights.title: Values
highlights.description: Professionalism, trust, respect, fairness, and responsibility guide everything we do.

highlights.title: Opportunities
highlights.description: Global career opportunities across diverse projects, technologies, and industries.

highlights.title: Rewards
highlights.description: Competitive compensation, benefits, learning programs, and clear career growth paths.

sections.title: People
sections.description: Our greatest asset is our people. We invest in hiring the best talent and providing them with an environment where they can thrive, innovate, and build lasting careers.

sections.title: Core Values
sections.description: Professionalism, trust, respect, fairness, and responsibility are the cornerstones of our culture. These values shape our interactions with clients, partners, and each other.

sections.title: Opportunities
sections.description: From cutting-edge technology projects to global client engagements, DSRC offers diverse career paths that challenge and inspire growth at every level.

sections.title: Rewards
sections.description: We offer competitive compensation packages, comprehensive benefits, continuous learning programs, and clear career progression paths that reward performance and dedication.

cta.title: Build a future you believe in
cta.subtitle: Send us your resume and let's explore how you can grow with us.
